text.title: AI Feature Eval Set Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

branch.question: Is ground truth fully deterministic (single canonical answer)?

conclusion.verdict: rule-based judge (exact / regex / parser); cheaper and noiseless
LLM-as-judge with Pydantic rubric (evidence + meets_criteria + failure_modes); pin model version
trajectory-eval-otel methodology applies; this eval focuses on the final answer; trajectory is the agent-loop eval

text.example: open-ended text → q-ground-truth: not deterministic → LLM-as-judge with rubric; sonnet judge; ci gate at 2pp.
